segments.speaker: 题目15/16
segments.text: Listen to a conversation. What do you know about this rock festival that's happening? Not much. Do you know what time it starts? It kicks off at 3:00p.m.. That's perfect. Oh, I remember hearing that. Therebe food trucks. Oh, right. And a dance floor. No way. You can't keep us away. Let's get there early so we can get a good spot.
